requirement_topic.en: Grid Integration, Smart Charging and Installation Rules — CEA Technical Standards and Ministry of Power Guidelines
requirement_topic.zh: 电网并网、智能充电与安装规则——CEA技术标准及电力部指南
requirement_topic.zht: 電網併網、智慧充電與安裝規則——CEA技術標準及電力部指南

summary.en: India's Central Electricity Authority (CEA) issues binding technical standards for electrical installations and grid connection. CEA (Technical Standards for Connection of Distributed Generation Resources) Regulations 2013 and subsequent amendments govern grid-side requirements for EV charging infrastructure. The Ministry of Power's Guidelines for Installation and Operation of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure 2024 (17 September 2024) specify public charging-station rollout, load management, demand response, smart metering compatibility, tariff principles, and protection requirements for EV chargers. Installation of EV charging points must comply with CEA (Measures Relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010 and state electricity authority rules. Chargers must be compatible with India's 230 V / 50 Hz single-phase and 415 V / 50 Hz three-phase supply, and earthing per IS 3043.
summary.zh: 印度中央电力局（CEA）发布关于电气装置及电网接入的具有约束力的技术标准。CEA（分布式发电资源接入技术标准）2013年法规及后续修订规定了电动汽车充电基础设施的电网侧要求。电力部《电动汽车充电基础设施安装与运营指南，2024》（2024年9月17日）规定了公共充电站部署、负荷管理、需求响应、智能电表兼容性、电价原则及充电桩保护要求。电动汽车充电点的安装须符合CEA（安全及供电相关措施）2010年法规及各邦电力局规定。充电桩须与印度230V/50Hz单相及415V/50Hz三相供电兼容，接地须符合IS 3043。
summary.zht: 印度中央電力局（CEA）發布關於電氣裝置及電網接入的具有約束力的技術標準。CEA（分布式發電資源接入技術標準）2013年法規及後續修訂規定了電動汽車充電基礎設施的電網側要求。電力部《電動汽車充電基礎設施安裝與運營指南，2024》（2024年9月17日）規定了公共充電站部署、負荷管理、需求響應、智慧電表相容性、電價原則及充電樁保護要求。電動汽車充電點的安裝須符合CEA（安全及供電相關措施）2010年法規及各邦電力局規定。充電樁須與印度230V/50Hz單相及415V/50Hz三相供電相容，接地須符合IS 3043。

standards_or_laws: CEA (Technical Standards for Connection of Distributed Generation Resources) Regulations 2013 (and amendments)
CEA (Measures Relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010
Guidelines for Installation and Operation of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure 2024, Ministry of Power, 17 September 2024
IS 3043:2018 — Code of practice for earthing (BIS)
IS 732:2019 — Code of practice for electrical wiring installations (BIS)

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station, MOHURD/MIIT) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure). Smart charging and demand response functions are addressed in GB/T 27930-2023 (Communication protocol between off-board conductive charger and battery management system). Chinese installation standards assume a TN-S earthing system typical of Chinese grid practice and 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply (380 V three-phase). Chinese installation documentation and grid-side compliance certificates are not accepted as substitutes for Indian CEA regulations or state authority approvals.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范，住建部/工业和信息化部）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜。智能充电及需求响应功能在GB/T 27930-2023（非车载传导式充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信协议）中规定。中国安装标准以中国电网实践中典型的TN-S接地系统及220V/50Hz单相（380V三相）供电为前提。中国安装文件及电网侧合规证书不被接受为印度CEA法规或各邦主管机构批准的替代。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範，住建部/工業和信息化部）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜。智慧充電及需求響應功能在GB/T 27930-2023（非車載傳導式充電機與電池管理系統之間的通信協議）中規定。中國安裝標準以中國電網實踐中典型的TN-S接地系統及220V/50Hz單相（380V三相）供電為前提。中國安裝文件及電網側合規證書不被接受為印度CEA法規或各邦主管機構批准的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocol between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: India operates a 230 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid (415 V three-phase), compatible with Chinese 50 Hz systems, but charger firmware, protection settings, and grid-interface parameters must be validated for Indian grid voltage and frequency tolerance bands per CEA standards. Key gaps: (1) Earthing system: India uses both TN-S and TT systems depending on state/region — product documentation must address IS 3043 compliance; (2) Smart metering and demand response: the Ministry of Power guidelines require chargers to be compatible with India's smart meter rollout (DLMS/COSEM protocol as per BIS IS 16444); (3) State-level electricity authority approvals: several Indian states require additional approval beyond central CEA standards; (4) CEA grid connection technical requirements must be documented for the distribution company (DISCOM) at time of installation. Chinese GB/T 51313 documentation does not substitute.
gap.zh: 印度采用230V/50Hz单相电网（三相415V），与中国50Hz系统兼容，但充电桩固件、保护整定值及电网接口参数须依据CEA标准针对印度电网电压和频率容差带进行验证。主要差距：（1）接地系统：印度各邦/地区并存TN-S和TT系统——产品文件须说明IS 3043合规性；（2）智能电表与需求响应：电力部指南要求充电桩与印度智能电表推广计划兼容（依据BIS IS 16444的DLMS/COSEM协议）；（3）邦级电力局批准：部分印度邦在中央CEA标准之外还要求额外审批；（4）安装时须向配电公司（DISCOM）提交CEA电网接入技术要求文件。中国GB/T 51313文件不可替代。
gap.zht: 印度採用230V/50Hz單相電網（三相415V），與中國50Hz系統相容，但充電樁韌體、保護整定值及電網接口參數須依據CEA標準針對印度電網電壓和頻率容差帶進行驗證。主要差距：（1）接地系統：印度各邦/地區並存TN-S和TT系統——產品文件須說明IS 3043合規性；（2）智慧電表與需求響應：電力部指南要求充電樁與印度智慧電表推廣計劃相容（依據BIS IS 16444的DLMS/COSEM協議）；（3）邦級電力局批准：部分印度邦在中央CEA標準之外還要求額外審批；（4）安裝時須向配電公司（DISCOM）提交CEA電網接入技術要求文件。中國GB/T 51313文件不可替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CEA regulations have statutory force; Ministry of Power Guidelines for Installation and Operation of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure 2024 apply to public/semi-public charging infrastructure; state electricity authority approvals required in many states
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966-2014 and GB/T 51313-2018 under MOHURD/MIIT; GB/T 27930-2023 for smart charging communication

source.publisher: Ministry of Power, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CEA regulations and Ministry of Power Guidelines for Installation and Operation of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure 2024 impose mandatory grid-integration, installation, and smart-charging requirements for EV chargers in India. Chinese GB/T installation standards and documentation are not substitutes. Exporters must verify CEA technical requirements, IS 3043 earthing compatibility, smart meter protocol support (IS 16444 / DLMS-COSEM), and obtain applicable DISCOM / state electricity authority approvals at time of installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CEA法规及电力部《电动汽车充电基础设施安装与运营指南，2024》对印度电动汽车充电桩的电网并网、安装及智能充电提出强制要求。中国GB/T安装标准及文件不可替代。出口商须核验CEA技术要求、IS 3043接地兼容性、智能电表协议支持（IS 16444/DLMS-COSEM），并在安装时取得相关DISCOM/邦级电力局批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CEA法規及電力部《電動汽車充電基礎設施安裝與運營指南，2024》對印度電動汽車充電樁的電網併網、安裝及智慧充電提出強制要求。中國GB/T安裝標準及文件不可替代。出口商須核驗CEA技術要求、IS 3043接地相容性、智慧電表協議支援（IS 16444/DLMS-COSEM），並在安裝時取得相關DISCOM/邦級電力局批准。
